hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -qi "vault-radar-license"; then printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Access to the Vault Radar license file is blocked. The license is fetched from Vault manually and must never enter the AI context.\"}}"; fi

input=$(cat); sid=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".session_id"); cmd=$(printf "%s" "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -qiE "terraform +apply|kubectl +(apply|delete|rollout)|gh +release +create|docker +push|npm +publish|helm +(upgrade|install)|serverless +deploy|cdk +deploy|aws +deploy|eb +deploy|(^|/| )deploy(\.sh)?( |$)|make +deploy|kamal +deploy"; then marker="/tmp/claude-plan-approved-$sid"; now=$(date +%s); if [ -f "$marker" ] && [ $((now - $(cat "$marker"))) -lt 14400 ]; then printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"allow\"}}"; else printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"Deployment blocked: no approved plan found for this session, or the approval expired (valid for 4 hours). Enter Plan Mode, present a plan, and get it approved via ExitPlanMode before running deploy commands.\"}}"; fi; else printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"allow\"}}"; fi
